---
title: "🎮 Noun Flashcard Game"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    theme: none
    page-layout: full
    embed-resources: true
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Nunito:wght@400;600;700;800;900&family=Fira+Code:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="../shared/_styles.css">
---

```{=html}
<div id="top-navbar">
  <div id="nav-title">
    🇩🇪 German A1 Language
    <span class="subtitle">Beginner Study Notes · <a href="../index.html" style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);text-decoration:none">← Back to Home</a></span>
  </div>
  <!-- AUTO-NAV-START -->
<div id="nav-tabs">
    <a class="nav-tab" href="alphabet.html">🔤 Alphabet</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="colors.html">🎨 Colors</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="communication.html">🗣️ Communication</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="countries.html">🌍 Countries & Languages</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="family.html">👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Family</a>
    <a class="nav-tab active" href="game.html">🎮 Noun Flashcard Game</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="grammar.html">📐 Grammar</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="hobbies.html">🎯 Hobbies</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="komposita.html">🔗 Komposita</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="numbers.html">🔢 Numbers</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="personal.html">👤 Personal Info</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="school.html">🏫 School</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="time.html">📅 Time & Calendar</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="flashcards.html">🃏 Flashcard Game</a>
</div>
<!-- AUTO-NAV-END -->
  <div id="nav-dropdown"></div>
</div>
<script src="../shared/_app.js"></script>

<div id="main-content">
  <div class="hero">
    <div class="flags">🇩🇪 🇦🇹 🇨🇭</div>
    <h1>🎮 Noun Flashcard Game</h1>
    <p>Click a card to flip it · See the illustration, German word &amp; pronunciation · Reveal the English on the back</p>
  </div>

<!-- ══════════════════ GAME STYLES ══════════════════ -->
<style>
  /* Filter bar */
  .filter-bar {
    display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 10px; align-items: center;
    margin: 0 0 1.6rem;
  }
  .filter-bar .fb-label {
    font-size: .82rem; font-weight: 700; color: #9333ea; text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: .08em; flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .filter-btn {
    background: #fff; border: 2px solid #e9d5ff; border-radius: 50px;
    padding: .35rem 1rem; font-size: .84rem; font-weight: 700; color: #5b21b6;
    cursor: pointer; transition: all .15s; font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif;
  }
  .filter-btn:hover { border-color: #a78bfa; background: #f5f0ff; }
  .filter-btn.active { background: linear-gradient(135deg,#5b21b6,#7c3aed); color: #fff; border-color: transparent; }
  .filter-btn.art-der { border-color: #93c5fd; color: #1d4ed8; }
  .filter-btn.art-der.active { background: linear-gradient(135deg,#1d4ed8,#3b82f6); color:#fff; border-color:transparent; }
  .filter-btn.art-die { border-color: #f9a8d4; color: #be185d; }
  .filter-btn.art-die.active { background: linear-gradient(135deg,#be185d,#ec4899); color:#fff; border-color:transparent; }
  .filter-btn.art-das { border-color: #6ee7b7; color: #065f46; }
  .filter-btn.art-das.active { background: linear-gradient(135deg,#065f46,#10b981); color:#fff; border-color:transparent; }

  /* Stats bar */
  .stats-bar {
    display: flex; gap: 1.2rem; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center;
    margin: 0 0 1.4rem; font-size: .88rem;
  }
  .stat-chip {
    background: #fff; border: 2px solid #e9d5ff; border-radius: 50px;
    padding: .3rem .9rem; font-weight: 700; color: #5b21b6;
  }
  .stat-chip span { color: #9333ea; }
  #shuffle-btn {
    margin-left: auto;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg,#5b21b6,#7c3aed);
    color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 50px; padding: .4rem 1.2rem;
    font-size: .88rem; font-weight: 800; cursor: pointer;
    font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif; transition: opacity .15s, transform .12s;
  }
  #shuffle-btn:hover { opacity: .88; transform: translateY(-1px); }

  /* Card grid */
  .card-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(190px, 1fr));
    gap: 20px;
    margin-bottom: 3rem;
  }

  /* Flip card */
  .flip-card {
    perspective: 900px;
    height: 260px;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  .flip-card-inner {
    position: relative; width: 100%; height: 100%;
    transition: transform .55s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);
    transform-style: preserve-3d;
  }
  .flip-card.flipped .flip-card-inner { transform: rotateY(180deg); }

  .flip-card-front,
  .flip-card-back {
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    border-radius: 18px;
    backface-visibility: hidden;
    -webkit-backface-visibility: hidden;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  /* Front */
  .flip-card-front {
    background: #fff;
    border: 2.5px solid #e9d5ff;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(124,58,237,.12);
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;
    padding: .9rem .7rem .7rem;
    transition: box-shadow .15s, border-color .15s;
  }
  .flip-card:hover .flip-card-front {
    box-shadow: 0 8px 28px rgba(124,58,237,.22);
    border-color: #a78bfa;
  }
  .flip-card-front.art-der { border-color: #93c5fd; }
  .flip-card-front.art-die { border-color: #f9a8d4; }
  .flip-card-front.art-das { border-color: #6ee7b7; }

  .card-article-badge {
    align-self: flex-start;
    font-size: .72rem; font-weight: 800; color: #fff;
    border-radius: 5px; padding: 2px 8px; margin-bottom: .4rem;
  }
  .art-der .card-article-badge { background: #2563eb; }
  .art-die .card-article-badge { background: #ec4899; }
  .art-das .card-article-badge { background: #10b981; }

  .card-illustration {
    flex: 1; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    width: 100%;
  }
  .card-illustration svg { width: 90px; height: 90px; }
  .card-illustration .card-emoji { font-size: 3.6rem; line-height: 1; }

  .card-de-word {
    font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 900; color: #2d2250;
    margin-top: .3rem; text-align: center;
  }
  .card-pron {
    font-size: .7rem; color: #9333ea; font-family: 'Fira Code', monospace;
    margin-top: 2px; text-align: center;
  }
  .card-flip-hint {
    font-size: .68rem; color: #c4b5fd; margin-top: .35rem;
  }

  /* Back */
  .flip-card-back {
    transform: rotateY(180deg);
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;
    justify-content: center; gap: .4rem;
    padding: 1rem;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .flip-card-back.art-der { background: linear-gradient(135deg,#dbeafe,#eff6ff); }
  .flip-card-back.art-die { background: linear-gradient(135deg,#fce7f3,#fdf2f8); }
  .flip-card-back.art-das { background: linear-gradient(135deg,#d1fae5,#ecfdf5); }

  .back-article {
    font-size: .78rem; font-weight: 800; color: #fff;
    border-radius: 6px; padding: 2px 10px;
  }
  .art-der .back-article { background: #2563eb; }
  .art-die .back-article { background: #ec4899; }
  .art-das .back-article { background: #10b981; }

  .back-de { font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 900; color: #2d2250; }
  .back-de-pron { font-size: .74rem; color: #7c3aed; font-family: 'Fira Code', monospace; }
  .back-divider { width: 40px; height: 2px; border-radius: 2px; margin: .3rem 0; }
  .art-der .back-divider { background: #93c5fd; }
  .art-die .back-divider { background: #f9a8d4; }
  .art-das .back-divider { background: #6ee7b7; }

  .back-en { font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 800; color: #374151; }
  .back-en-pron { font-size: .72rem; color: #9ca3af; font-family: 'Fira Code', monospace; }
  .back-category { font-size: .68rem; color: #9ca3af; margin-top: .2rem; }

  .no-cards-msg {
    grid-column: 1/-1; text-align: center; padding: 3rem;
    color: #9ca3af; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700;
  }
</style>

<!-- ══════════════════ FILTER + STATS BAR ══════════════════ -->
<div class="filter-bar">
  <span class="fb-label">Filter:</span>
  <button class="filter-btn active" data-filter="all"    onclick="setFilter(this,'all')">All</button>
  <button class="filter-btn art-der" data-filter="der"  onclick="setFilter(this,'der')">🔵 der (m)</button>
  <button class="filter-btn art-die" data-filter="die"  onclick="setFilter(this,'die')">🔴 die (f)</button>
  <button class="filter-btn art-das" data-filter="das"  onclick="setFilter(this,'das')">🟢 das (n)</button>
  <button class="filter-btn" data-filter="communication" onclick="setFilter(this,'communication')">🗣️ Communication</button>
  <button class="filter-btn" data-filter="school"        onclick="setFilter(this,'school')">🏫 School</button>
  <button class="filter-btn" data-filter="family"        onclick="setFilter(this,'family')">👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Family</button>
  <button class="filter-btn" data-filter="time"          onclick="setFilter(this,'time')">📅 Time</button>
  <button class="filter-btn" data-filter="food"          onclick="setFilter(this,'food')">🍽️ Food</button>
  <button class="filter-btn" data-filter="nature"        onclick="setFilter(this,'nature')">🌿 Nature</button>
</div>

<div class="stats-bar">
  <div class="stat-chip">Total: <span id="stat-total">0</span></div>
  <div class="stat-chip">Showing: <span id="stat-showing">0</span></div>
  <div class="stat-chip">Flipped: <span id="stat-flipped">0</span></div>
  <button id="shuffle-btn" onclick="shuffleCards()">🔀 Shuffle</button>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════ CARD GRID ══════════════════ -->
<div class="card-grid" id="card-grid">
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════ NOUN DATA + GAME SCRIPT ══════════════════ -->
<script>
/* ── Noun database ─────────────────────────────────────────────
   Each entry: { art, de, pron, en, enPron, emoji, category }
   art   : "der" | "die" | "das"
   pron  : German pronunciation guide
   enPron: English pronunciation guide
   emoji : single emoji used as the illustration
   category: used for filter buttons
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
const NOUNS = [
  /* ── People & Titles ── */
  { art:"der", de:"Mann",        pron:"[man]",           en:"man",         enPron:"[mæn]",          emoji:"🧔", category:"communication" },
  { art:"die", de:"Frau",        pron:"[frow]",          en:"woman/Mrs",   enPron:"[ˈwʊmən]",       emoji:"👩", category:"communication" },
  { art:"das", de:"Kind",        pron:"[kint]",          en:"child",       enPron:"[tʃaɪld]",       emoji:"🧒", category:"family" },
  { art:"der", de:"Junge",       pron:"[YOONG-eh]",      en:"boy",         enPron:"[bɔɪ]",          emoji:"👦", category:"family" },
  { art:"das", de:"Mädchen",     pron:"[MAYD-khen]",     en:"girl",        enPron:"[ɡɜːl]",         emoji:"👧", category:"family" },
  { art:"der", de:"Herr",        pron:"[hair]",          en:"Mr / sir",    enPron:"[ˈmɪstər]",      emoji:"🎩", category:"communication" },
  { art:"die", de:"Dame",        pron:"[DAH-meh]",       en:"lady",        enPron:"[ˈleɪdi]",       emoji:"👒", category:"communication" },

  /* ── Family ── */
  { art:"die", de:"Mutter",      pron:"[MOOT-er]",       en:"mother",      enPron:"[ˈmʌðər]",       emoji:"👩‍👦", category:"family" },
  { art:"der", de:"Vater",       pron:"[FAH-ter]",       en:"father",      enPron:"[ˈfɑːðər]",      emoji:"👨‍👦", category:"family" },
  { art:"die", de:"Eltern",      pron:"[EL-tern]",       en:"parents",     enPron:"[ˈpeərənts]",    emoji:"👨‍👩‍👦", category:"family" },
  { art:"der", de:"Bruder",      pron:"[BROO-der]",      en:"brother",     enPron:"[ˈbrʌðər]",      emoji:"👦", category:"family" },
  { art:"die", de:"Schwester",   pron:"[SHVES-ter]",     en:"sister",      enPron:"[ˈsɪstər]",      emoji:"👧", category:"family" },
  { art:"der", de:"Sohn",        pron:"[zohn]",          en:"son",         enPron:"[sʌn]",          emoji:"👦", category:"family" },
  { art:"die", de:"Tochter",     pron:"[TOKH-ter]",      en:"daughter",    enPron:"[ˈdɔːtər]",      emoji:"👧", category:"family" },
  { art:"der", de:"Onkel",       pron:"[ONK-el]",        en:"uncle",       enPron:"[ˈʌŋkəl]",       emoji:"👨", category:"family" },
  { art:"die", de:"Tante",       pron:"[TAN-teh]",       en:"aunt",        enPron:"[ɑːnt]",         emoji:"👩", category:"family" },
  { art:"der", de:"Großvater",   pron:"[GROHS-fah-ter]", en:"grandfather", enPron:"[ˈɡrændˌfɑːðər]",emoji:"👴", category:"family" },
  { art:"die", de:"Großmutter",  pron:"[GROHS-moot-er]", en:"grandmother", enPron:"[ˈɡrændˌmʌðər]", emoji:"👵", category:"family" },
  { art:"der", de:"Cousin",      pron:"[koo-ZAN]",       en:"cousin (m)",  enPron:"[ˈkʌzən]",       emoji:"🧑", category:"family" },
  { art:"die", de:"Cousine",     pron:"[koo-ZEE-neh]",   en:"cousin (f)",  enPron:"[ˈkʌzən]",       emoji:"🧑", category:"family" },
  { art:"der", de:"Neffe",       pron:"[NEF-eh]",        en:"nephew",      enPron:"[ˈnefjuː]",      emoji:"🧒", category:"family" },
  { art:"die", de:"Nichte",      pron:"[NIK-teh]",       en:"niece",       enPron:"[niːs]",         emoji:"🧒", category:"family" },

  /* ── School & Classroom ── */
  { art:"die", de:"Tafel",       pron:"[TAH-fel]",       en:"blackboard",  enPron:"[ˈblækbɔːrd]",   emoji:"🖊️", category:"school" },
  { art:"die", de:"Tasche",      pron:"[TASH-eh]",       en:"bag",         enPron:"[bæɡ]",          emoji:"👜", category:"school" },
  { art:"das", de:"Laptop",      pron:"[LAP-top]",       en:"laptop",      enPron:"[ˈlæptɒp]",      emoji:"💻", category:"school" },
  { art:"das", de:"Fenster",     pron:"[FEN-ster]",      en:"window",      enPron:"[ˈwɪndəʊ]",      emoji:"🪟", category:"school" },
  { art:"die", de:"Tür",         pron:"[tueer]",         en:"door",        enPron:"[dɔːr]",         emoji:"🚪", category:"school" },
  { art:"der", de:"Kuli",        pron:"[KOO-lee]",       en:"ballpoint pen",enPron:"[ˈbɔːlpɔɪnt]",  emoji:"🖊️", category:"school" },
  { art:"das", de:"Buch",        pron:"[bookh]",         en:"book",        enPron:"[bʊk]",          emoji:"📖", category:"school" },
  { art:"der", de:"Rucksack",    pron:"[ROOK-zak]",      en:"backpack",    enPron:"[ˈbækpæk]",      emoji:"🎒", category:"school" },
  { art:"der", de:"Computer",    pron:"[kom-PYOO-ter]",  en:"computer",    enPron:"[kəmˈpjuːtər]",  emoji:"🖥️", category:"school" },
  { art:"der", de:"Stift",       pron:"[shtift]",        en:"pen/marker",  enPron:"[pen]",          emoji:"✏️", category:"school" },
  { art:"der", de:"Bleistift",   pron:"[BLY-shtift]",    en:"pencil",      enPron:"[ˈpensəl]",      emoji:"✏️", category:"school" },
  { art:"der", de:"Radiergummi", pron:"[rah-DEER-goom-ee]",en:"eraser",    enPron:"[ɪˈreɪzər]",     emoji:"🧹", category:"school" },
  { art:"der", de:"Tisch",       pron:"[tish]",          en:"table",       enPron:"[ˈteɪbəl]",      emoji:"🪑", category:"school" },
  { art:"der", de:"Stuhl",       pron:"[shtool]",        en:"chair",       enPron:"[tʃeər]",        emoji:"🪑", category:"school" },
  { art:"die", de:"Uhr",         pron:"[oor]",           en:"clock/watch", enPron:"[klɒk]",         emoji:"🕐", category:"school" },
  { art:"das", de:"Heft",        pron:"[heft]",          en:"notebook",    enPron:"[ˈnəʊtbʊk]",     emoji:"📓", category:"school" },
  { art:"das", de:"Lineal",      pron:"[lin-ay-AHL]",    en:"ruler",       enPron:"[ˈruːlər]",      emoji:"📏", category:"school" },
  { art:"das", de:"Handy",       pron:"[HEN-dee]",       en:"mobile phone",enPron:"[ˈməʊbaɪl]",     emoji:"📱", category:"school" },
  { art:"die", de:"Schere",      pron:"[SHAY-reh]",      en:"scissors",    enPron:"[ˈsɪzərz]",      emoji:"✂️", category:"school" },
  { art:"die", de:"Schule",      pron:"[SHOO-leh]",      en:"school",      enPron:"[skuːl]",        emoji:"🏫", category:"school" },
  { art:"das", de:"Fach",        pron:"[fakh]",          en:"subject",     enPron:"[ˈsʌbdʒɪkt]",    emoji:"📚", category:"school" },
  { art:"die", de:"Pause",       pron:"[POW-zeh]",       en:"break",       enPron:"[breɪk]",        emoji:"☕", category:"school" },
  { art:"die", de:"Klasse",      pron:"[KLAS-seh]",      en:"class",       enPron:"[klɑːs]",        emoji:"🏫", category:"school" },

  /* ── Time & Calendar ── */
  { art:"der", de:"Montag",      pron:"[MON-tahk]",      en:"Monday",      enPron:"[ˈmʌndeɪ]",      emoji:"📅", category:"time" },
  { art:"der", de:"Dienstag",    pron:"[DEENS-tahk]",    en:"Tuesday",     enPron:"[ˈtjuːzdeɪ]",    emoji:"📅", category:"time" },
  { art:"der", de:"Mittwoch",    pron:"[MIT-vokh]",      en:"Wednesday",   enPron:"[ˈwenzdeɪ]",     emoji:"📅", category:"time" },
  { art:"der", de:"Donnerstag",  pron:"[DON-ners-tahk]", en:"Thursday",    enPron:"[ˈθɜːzdeɪ]",     emoji:"📅", category:"time" },
  { art:"der", de:"Freitag",     pron:"[FRY-tahk]",      en:"Friday",      enPron:"[ˈfraɪdeɪ]",     emoji:"📅", category:"time" },
  { art:"der", de:"Samstag",     pron:"[ZAM-stahk]",     en:"Saturday",    enPron:"[ˈsætədeɪ]",     emoji:"📅", category:"time" },
  { art:"der", de:"Sonntag",     pron:"[ZON-tahk]",      en:"Sunday",      enPron:"[ˈsʌndeɪ]",      emoji:"☀️", category:"time" },
  { art:"das", de:"Wochenende",  pron:"[VO-khen-en-deh]",en:"weekend",     enPron:"[ˈwiːkend]",     emoji:"🎉", category:"time" },
  { art:"der", de:"Morgen",      pron:"[MOR-gen]",       en:"morning",     enPron:"[ˈmɔːnɪŋ]",      emoji:"🌅", category:"time" },
  { art:"der", de:"Mittag",      pron:"[MIT-tahk]",      en:"noon",        enPron:"[nuːn]",         emoji:"☀️", category:"time" },
  { art:"der", de:"Abend",       pron:"[AH-bent]",       en:"evening",     enPron:"[ˈiːvnɪŋ]",      emoji:"🌆", category:"time" },
  { art:"die", de:"Nacht",       pron:"[nakht]",         en:"night",       enPron:"[naɪt]",         emoji:"🌙", category:"time" },
  { art:"die", de:"Mitternacht", pron:"[MIT-ter-nakht]", en:"midnight",    enPron:"[ˈmɪdnaɪt]",     emoji:"🌃", category:"time" },
  { art:"die", de:"Woche",       pron:"[VO-kheh]",       en:"week",        enPron:"[wiːk]",         emoji:"🗓️", category:"time" },
  { art:"der", de:"Monat",       pron:"[MOH-nat]",       en:"month",       enPron:"[mʌnθ]",         emoji:"📆", category:"time" },
  { art:"das", de:"Jahr",        pron:"[yahr]",          en:"year",        enPron:"[jɪər]",         emoji:"🎆", category:"time" },
  { art:"der", de:"Winter",      pron:"[VIN-ter]",       en:"winter",      enPron:"[ˈwɪntər]",      emoji:"❄️", category:"time" },
  { art:"der", de:"Frühling",    pron:"[FRUE-ling]",     en:"spring",      enPron:"[sprɪŋ]",        emoji:"🌸", category:"time" },
  { art:"der", de:"Sommer",      pron:"[ZOM-er]",        en:"summer",      enPron:"[ˈsʌmər]",       emoji:"☀️", category:"time" },
  { art:"der", de:"Herbst",      pron:"[hairpst]",       en:"autumn/fall", enPron:"[ˈɔːtəm]",       emoji:"🍂", category:"time" },

  /* ── Communication & Everyday ── */
  { art:"die", de:"Sprache",     pron:"[SHPRAH-kheh]",   en:"language",    enPron:"[ˈlæŋɡwɪdʒ]",   emoji:"💬", category:"communication" },
  { art:"das", de:"Land",        pron:"[lant]",          en:"country",     enPron:"[ˈkʌntri]",      emoji:"🗺️", category:"communication" },
  { art:"die", de:"Stadt",       pron:"[shtat]",         en:"city",        enPron:"[ˈsɪti]",        emoji:"🏙️", category:"communication" },
  { art:"die", de:"Adresse",     pron:"[ah-DRES-eh]",    en:"address",     enPron:"[əˈdres]",       emoji:"📮", category:"communication" },
  { art:"die", de:"Telefonnummer",pron:"[teh-leh-FOHN-noom-er]",en:"phone number",enPron:"[fəʊn ˈnʌmbər]",emoji:"📞", category:"communication" },
  { art:"der", de:"Name",        pron:"[NAH-meh]",       en:"name",        enPron:"[neɪm]",         emoji:"🪪", category:"communication" },
  { art:"das", de:"Alter",       pron:"[AL-ter]",        en:"age",         enPron:"[eɪdʒ]",         emoji:"🎂", category:"personal" },
  { art:"der", de:"Beruf",       pron:"[beh-ROOF]",      en:"job/profession",enPron:"[prəˈfeʃən]",  emoji:"💼", category:"personal" },
  { art:"die", de:"Nationalität",pron:"[nat-see-oh-na-lee-TAYT]",en:"nationality",enPron:"[ˌnæʃəˈnælɪti]",emoji:"🏳️", category:"personal" },

  /* ── Food & Drink ── */
  { art:"das", de:"Brot",        pron:"[broht]",         en:"bread",       enPron:"[bred]",         emoji:"🍞", category:"food" },
  { art:"die", de:"Milch",       pron:"[milkh]",         en:"milk",        enPron:"[mɪlk]",         emoji:"🥛", category:"food" },
  { art:"der", de:"Kaffee",      pron:"[KAF-feh]",       en:"coffee",      enPron:"[ˈkɒfi]",        emoji:"☕", category:"food" },
  { art:"der", de:"Tee",         pron:"[tay]",           en:"tea",         enPron:"[tiː]",          emoji:"🍵", category:"food" },
  { art:"das", de:"Wasser",      pron:"[VAS-er]",        en:"water",       enPron:"[ˈwɔːtər]",      emoji:"💧", category:"food" },
  { art:"der", de:"Wein",        pron:"[vine]",          en:"wine",        enPron:"[waɪn]",         emoji:"🍷", category:"food" },
  { art:"das", de:"Bier",        pron:"[beer]",          en:"beer",        enPron:"[bɪər]",         emoji:"🍺", category:"food" },
  { art:"der", de:"Kuchen",      pron:"[KOO-khen]",      en:"cake",        enPron:"[keɪk]",         emoji:"🎂", category:"food" },
  { art:"die", de:"Butter",      pron:"[BOOT-er]",       en:"butter",      enPron:"[ˈbʌtər]",       emoji:"🧈", category:"food" },
  { art:"der", de:"Käse",        pron:"[KAY-zeh]",       en:"cheese",      enPron:"[tʃiːz]",        emoji:"🧀", category:"food" },
  { art:"das", de:"Fleisch",     pron:"[flysh]",         en:"meat",        enPron:"[miːt]",         emoji:"🥩", category:"food" },
  { art:"der", de:"Fisch",       pron:"[fish]",          en:"fish",        enPron:"[fɪʃ]",          emoji:"🐟", category:"food" },
  { art:"das", de:"Gemüse",      pron:"[geh-MUE-zeh]",   en:"vegetables",  enPron:"[ˈvedʒtəbəlz]",  emoji:"🥦", category:"food" },
  { art:"das", de:"Obst",        pron:"[ohpst]",         en:"fruit",       enPron:"[fruːt]",        emoji:"🍎", category:"food" },
  { art:"die", de:"Flasche",     pron:"[FLASH-eh]",      en:"bottle",      enPron:"[ˈbɒtəl]",       emoji:"🍾", category:"food" },

  /* ── Home & Objects ── */
  { art:"das", de:"Haus",        pron:"[hows]",          en:"house",       enPron:"[haʊs]",         emoji:"🏠", category:"home" },
  { art:"die", de:"Wohnung",     pron:"[VOH-noong]",     en:"apartment",   enPron:"[əˈpɑːtmənt]",   emoji:"🏢", category:"home" },
  { art:"das", de:"Zimmer",      pron:"[TSIM-er]",       en:"room",        enPron:"[ruːm]",         emoji:"🚪", category:"home" },
  { art:"die", de:"Küche",       pron:"[KUE-kheh]",      en:"kitchen",     enPron:"[ˈkɪtʃɪn]",      emoji:"🍳", category:"home" },
  { art:"das", de:"Badezimmer",  pron:"[BAH-deh-tsim-er]",en:"bathroom",   enPron:"[ˈbɑːθruːm]",    emoji:"🛁", category:"home" },
  { art:"das", de:"Schlafzimmer",pron:"[SHLAHF-tsim-er]",en:"bedroom",     enPron:"[ˈbedruːm]",     emoji:"🛏️", category:"home" },
  { art:"das", de:"Wohnzimmer",  pron:"[VOHN-tsim-er]",  en:"living room", enPron:"[ˈlɪvɪŋ ruːm]",  emoji:"🛋️", category:"home" },
  { art:"der", de:"Garten",      pron:"[GAR-ten]",       en:"garden",      enPron:"[ˈɡɑːdən]",      emoji:"🌳", category:"nature" },

  /* ── Transport & Places ── */
  { art:"das", de:"Auto",        pron:"[OW-toh]",        en:"car",         enPron:"[kɑːr]",         emoji:"🚗", category:"transport" },
  { art:"der", de:"Bus",         pron:"[boos]",          en:"bus",         enPron:"[bʌs]",          emoji:"🚌", category:"transport" },
  { art:"der", de:"Zug",         pron:"[tsook]",         en:"train",       enPron:"[treɪn]",        emoji:"🚆", category:"transport" },
  { art:"das", de:"Fahrrad",     pron:"[FAR-raht]",      en:"bicycle",     enPron:"[ˈbaɪsɪkəl]",    emoji:"🚲", category:"transport" },
  { art:"das", de:"Flugzeug",    pron:"[FLOOK-tsoyk]",   en:"aeroplane",   enPron:"[ˈeərəpleɪn]",   emoji:"✈️", category:"transport" },

  /* ── Nature & Animals ── */
  { art:"der", de:"Baum",        pron:"[bowm]",          en:"tree",        enPron:"[triː]",         emoji:"🌳", category:"nature" },
  { art:"die", de:"Blume",       pron:"[BLOO-meh]",      en:"flower",      enPron:"[ˈflaʊər]",      emoji:"🌸", category:"nature" },
  { art:"der", de:"Hund",        pron:"[hoont]",         en:"dog",         enPron:"[dɒɡ]",          emoji:"🐕", category:"nature" },
  { art:"die", de:"Katze",       pron:"[KAT-seh]",       en:"cat",         enPron:"[kæt]",          emoji:"🐱", category:"nature" },
  { art:"der", de:"Vogel",       pron:"[FOH-gel]",       en:"bird",        enPron:"[bɜːrd]",        emoji:"🐦", category:"nature" },
  { art:"die", de:"Sonne",       pron:"[ZON-neh]",       en:"sun",         enPron:"[sʌn]",          emoji:"☀️", category:"nature" },
  { art:"der", de:"Regen",       pron:"[RAY-gen]",       en:"rain",        enPron:"[reɪn]",         emoji:"🌧️", category:"nature" },
  { art:"der", de:"Schnee",      pron:"[shnay]",         en:"snow",        enPron:"[snəʊ]",         emoji:"❄️", category:"nature" },
];

/* ── State ───────────────────────────────────────────────── */
let currentFilter = 'all';
let flippedCount  = 0;
let displayOrder  = [...NOUNS.keys()]; // indices into NOUNS

/* ── Render ──────────────────────────────────────────────── */
function artClass(art) { return 'art-' + art; }

function buildCard(noun, idx) {
  const ac = artClass(noun.art);
  return `
<div class="flip-card ${ac}" id="fc-${idx}" onclick="flipCard(this, ${idx})">
  <div class="flip-card-inner">

    <div class="flip-card-front ${ac}">
      <div class="card-article-badge">${noun.art}</div>
      <div class="card-illustration">
        <span class="card-emoji">${noun.emoji}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="card-de-word">${noun.art} ${noun.de}</div>
      <div class="card-pron">${noun.pron}</div>
      <div class="card-flip-hint">tap to flip →</div>
    </div>

    <div class="flip-card-back ${ac}">
      <span class="back-article">${noun.art}</span>
      <div class="back-de">${noun.de}</div>
      <div class="back-de-pron">${noun.pron}</div>
      <div class="back-divider"></div>
      <div class="back-en">${noun.en}</div>
      <div class="back-en-pron">${noun.enPron}</div>
      <div class="back-category">${noun.category}</div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>`;
}

function getFiltered() {
  if (currentFilter === 'all')                         return displayOrder;
  if (['der','die','das'].includes(currentFilter))     return displayOrder.filter(i => NOUNS[i].art === currentFilter);
  return displayOrder.filter(i => NOUNS[i].category === currentFilter);
}

function render() {
  const grid = document.getElementById('card-grid');
  const indices = getFiltered();
  if (indices.length === 0) {
    grid.innerHTML = '<div class="no-cards-msg">No cards match this filter.</div>';
  } else {
    grid.innerHTML = indices.map(i => buildCard(NOUNS[i], i)).join('');
  }
  flippedCount = 0;
  document.getElementById('stat-total').textContent   = NOUNS.length;
  document.getElementById('stat-showing').textContent = indices.length;
  document.getElementById('stat-flipped').textContent = 0;
}

/* ── Flip ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
function flipCard(el, idx) {
  const wasFlipped = el.classList.contains('flipped');
  el.classList.toggle('flipped');
  flippedCount += wasFlipped ? -1 : 1;
  document.getElementById('stat-flipped').textContent = flippedCount;
}

/* ── Filter ──────────────────────────────────────────────── */
function setFilter(btn, filter) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
  currentFilter = filter;
  displayOrder  = [...NOUNS.keys()];
  render();
}

/* ── Shuffle ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */
function shuffleCards() {
  displayOrder = displayOrder.sort(() => Math.random() - 0.5);
  render();
}

/* ── Init ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', render);
</script>

<div style="text-align:center;margin-top:2rem;padding:1.5rem;color:#9333ea;font-size:.9rem;">
  <a href="../index.html" style="color:#7c3aed;font-weight:700;text-decoration:none">← Back to All Topics</a>
  &nbsp;·&nbsp; <em>Viel Erfolg!</em>
</div>
</div><!-- /main-content -->
```
